name: catwifmask
description: $MASK is a fully community-led project, guided by @stellagabber to ensure transparency, strong leadership, and execution against well-defined roadmaps. Every decision is made with accountability and purpose, reflecting the community’s collective vision and priorities. catwifmask was created with a single mission: to make a mark on social media, one $MASK at a time, building a culture and brand that resonates with holders. While the token has no intrinsic financial value, the project is expanding its utility through upcoming merchandise and an NFT collection, introducing new revenue streams to support growth. By empowering the community to take ownership, $MASK ensures that every move is deliberate, coordinated, and aligned with long-term goals, creating a transparent, organised, and sustainable ecosystem.
